title: U.S. Solar Installations Fell in 2025 as Trump Attacked Clean Energy
summary_full: More solar energy was added to U.S. grids than any other technology, but the amount installed fell by 14 percent, according to a new report.
summary_public: More solar energy was added to U.S. grids than any other technology, but the amount installed fell by 14 percent, according to a new report.
